title: Get Heart Rate Intraday by Date
description:
This endpoint retrieves the heart rate intraday time series data on a specific date or 24 hour period. Intraday support can extend the detail-level response to include 1sec, 1min, 5min or 15min for Heart Rate.

3rd-party developers who want access to retrieve other Fitbit users’ Intraday data through the “Client” or “Server” application type should submit a request by filling out this form . A Fitbit developer’s personal Intraday data is automatically available through the “Personal” application type. You do not need to submit a request.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today

parameters.name: detail-level
parameters.description: Number of data points to include Supported: 1sec | 1min | 5min | 15min

parameters.name: start-time
parameters.description: The start of the time period in the format HH:mm .

parameters.name: end-time
parameters.description: The end of the time period in the format HH:mm .

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: Returns the response from the specified timezone. Supported: UTC

response_fields.name: activities-heart : datetime
response_fields.description: Date of the heart rate log

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : customHeartRateZone : caloriesOut
response_fields.description: Number calories burned with the custom heart rate zone

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : customHeartRateZone : max
response_fields.description: Maximum range for the custom heart rate zone

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : customHeartRateZone : min
response_fields.description: Minimum range for the custom heart rate zone

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : customHeartRateZone : minutes
response_fields.description: Number minutes withing the custom heart rate zone

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : customHeartRateZone : name
response_fields.description: Name of the custom heart rate zone

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : HeartRateZone : caloriesOut
response_fields.description: Number calories burned with the specified heart rate zone

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : HeartRateZone : max
response_fields.description: Maximum range for the heart rate zone

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : HeartRateZone : min
response_fields.description: Minimum range for the heart rate zone

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : HeartRateZone : minutes
response_fields.description: Number minutes withing the specified heart rate zone

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : HeartRateZone : name
response_fields.description: Name of the heart rate zone

response_fields.name: activities-heart : value : restingHeartRate
response_fields.description: The user’s calculated resting heart rate. See Resting Heart Rate .

response_fields.name: activities-heart-intraday : dataset : time
response_fields.description: The time the intraday heart rate value was recorded

response_fields.name: activities-heart-intraday : datasetType
response_fields.description: The requested detail-level unit of measure
